context.description: Scope under which the request is made; determines fields present in response.

per_page.description: Maximum number of items to be returned in result set.

search.description: Limit results to coupons with codes matching a given string.

after.description: Limit response to resources published after a given ISO8601 compliant date.

before.description: Limit response to resources published before a given ISO8601 compliant date.

modified_after.description: Limit response to resources modified after a given ISO8601 compliant date.

modified_before.description: Limit response to resources modified before a given ISO8601 compliant date.

dates_are_gmt.description: Whether to consider GMT post dates when limiting response by published or modified date.

exclude.description: Ensure result set excludes specific IDs.

include.description: Limit result set to specific ids.

offset.description: Offset the result set by a specific number of items.

order.description: Order sort attribute ascending or descending.

code.description: Limit result set to resources with a specific code.

amount.description: The amount of discount. Should always be numeric, even if setting a percentage.

status.description: The status of the coupon. Should always be draft, published, or pending review

discount_type.description: Determines the type of discount that will be applied.

date_expires.description: The date the coupon expires, in the site's timezone.

date_expires_gmt.description: The date the coupon expires, as GMT.

individual_use.description: If true, the coupon can only be used individually. Other applied coupons will be removed from the cart.

product_ids.description: List of product IDs the coupon can be used on.

excluded_product_ids.description: List of product IDs the coupon cannot be used on.

usage_limit.description: How many times the coupon can be used in total.

usage_limit_per_user.description: How many times the coupon can be used per customer.

limit_usage_to_x_items.description: Max number of items in the cart the coupon can be applied to.

free_shipping.description: If true and if the free shipping method requires a coupon, this coupon will enable free shipping.

product_categories.description: List of category IDs the coupon applies to.

excluded_product_categories.description: List of category IDs the coupon does not apply to.

exclude_sale_items.description: If true, this coupon will not be applied to items that have sale prices.

minimum_amount.description: Minimum order amount that needs to be in the cart before coupon applies.

maximum_amount.description: Maximum order amount allowed when using the coupon.

email_restrictions.description: List of email addresses that can use this coupon.

per_page.description: Maximum number of items to be returned in result set.

search.description: Limit results to those matching a string.

after.description: Limit response to resources published after a given ISO8601 compliant date.

before.description: Limit response to resources published before a given ISO8601 compliant date.

exclude.description: Ensure result set excludes specific IDs.

include.description: Limit result set to specific ids.

offset.description: Offset the result set by a specific number of items.

order.description: Order sort attribute ascending or descending.

parent.description: Limit result set to those of particular parent IDs.

parent_exclude.description: Limit result set to all items except those of a particular parent ID.

status.description: Limit result set to orders which have specific statuses.

customer.description: Limit result set to orders assigned a specific customer.

product.description: Limit result set to orders assigned a specific product.

dp.description: Number of decimal points to use in each resource.

order_item_display_meta.description: Only show meta which is meant to be displayed for an order.

created_via.description: Limit result set to orders created via specific sources (e.g. checkout, admin).

number.description: Limit result set to orders matching part of an order number.

created_via.description: Shows where the order was created.

currency.description: Currency the order was created with, in ISO format.

customer_id.description: User ID who owns the order. 0 for guests.

customer_note.description: Note left by customer during checkout.

state.description: ISO code or name of the state, province or district.

country.description: Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

state.description: ISO code or name of the state, province or district.

country.description: Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

parent_name.description: Parent product name if the product is a variation.

image.description: Properties of the main product image.

nominal_amount.description: Discount amount as defined in the coupon (absolute value or a percent, depending on the discount type).

free_shipping.description: Whether the coupon grants free shipping or not.

set_paid.description: Define if the order is paid. It will set the status to processing and reduce stock items.

manual_update.description: Set the action as manual so that the order note registers as "added by user".

search.description: Search by similar product name or sku.

after.description: Limit response to resources published after a given ISO8601 compliant date.

before.description: Limit response to resources published before a given ISO8601 compliant date.

modified_after.description: Limit response to resources modified after a given ISO8601 compliant date.

modified_before.description: Limit response to resources modified before a given ISO8601 compliant date.

exclude.description: Ensure result set excludes specific IDs.

include.description: Limit result set to specific ids.

offset.description: Offset the result set by a specific number of items.

order.description: Order sort attribute ascending or descending.

parent.description: Limit result set to those of particular parent IDs.

parent_exclude.description: Limit result set to all items except those of a particular parent ID.

brand.description: Limit result set to products assigned a specific brand ID.

slug.description: Limit result set to products with a specific slug.

status.description: Limit result set to products assigned a specific status.

type.description: Limit result set to products assigned a specific type.

sku.description: Limit result set to products with specific SKU(s). Use commas to separate.

featured.description: Limit result set to featured products.

category.description: Limit result set to products assigned a specific category ID.

tag.description: Limit result set to products assigned a specific tag ID.

shipping_class.description: Limit result set to products assigned a specific shipping class ID.

attribute.description: Limit result set to products with a specific attribute. Use the taxonomy name/attribute slug.

attribute_term.description: Limit result set to products with a specific attribute term ID (required an assigned attribute).

on_sale.description: Limit result set to products on sale.

min_price.description: Limit result set to products based on a minimum price.

max_price.description: Limit result set to products based on a maximum price.

stock_status.description: Limit result set to products with specified stock status.

search_sku.description: Limit results to those with a SKU that partial matches a string. This argument takes precedence over 'sku'.

search_name_or_sku.description: Limit results to those with a name or SKU that partial matches a string. This argument takes precedence over 'search', 'sku' and 'search_sku'.

search_fields.description: Limit search to specific fields when used with search parameter. Available fields: name, sku, global_unique_id, description, short_description. This argument takes precedence over all other search parameters.

include_status.description: Limit result set to products with any of the statuses.

exclude_status.description: Exclude products with any of the statuses from result set.

include_types.description: Limit result set to products with any of the types.

exclude_types.description: Exclude products with any of the types from result set.

downloadable.description: Limit result set to downloadable products.

virtual.description: Limit result set to virtual products.

pos_products_only.description: Limit result set to products visible in Point of Sale.

low_in_stock.description: Limit result set to products that are low or out of stock. (Deprecated)

date_created.description: The date the product was created, in the site's timezone.

date_created_gmt.description: The date the product was created, as GMT.

date_on_sale_from.description: Start date of sale price, in the site's timezone.

date_on_sale_from_gmt.description: Start date of sale price, as GMT.

date_on_sale_to.description: End date of sale price, in the site's timezone.

date_on_sale_to_gmt.description: End date of sale price, in the site's timezone.

download_limit.description: Number of times downloadable files can be downloaded after purchase.

download_expiry.description: Number of days until access to downloadable files expires.

external_url.description: Product external URL. Only for external products.

button_text.description: Product external button text. Only for external products.

stock_status.description: Controls the stock status of the product.

backorders.description: If managing stock, this controls if backorders are allowed.

low_stock_amount.description: Low Stock amount for the product.

sold_individually.description: Allow one item to be bought in a single order.

purchase_note.description: Optional note to send the customer after purchase.

date_created.description: The date the image was created, in the site's timezone.

date_created_gmt.description: The date the image was created, as GMT.

date_modified.description: The date the image was last modified, in the site's timezone.

date_modified_gmt.description: The date the image was last modified, as GMT.

visible.description: Define if the attribute is visible on the "Additional information" tab in the product's page.

variation.description: Define if the attribute can be used as variation.

options.description: List of available term names of the attribute.

menu_order.description: Menu order, used to custom sort products.

attributes.description: Limit result set to products with specified attributes.

virtual.description: Limit result set to virtual product variations.

downloadable.description: Limit result set to downloadable product variations.

include_status.description: Limit result set to product variations with any of the statuses.

exclude_status.description: Exclude product variations with any of the statuses from result set.

pos_products_only.description: Limit result set to variations visible in Point of Sale.

product_id.description: Unique identifier for the variable product.

date_on_sale_from.description: Start date of sale price, in the site's timezone.

date_on_sale_from_gmt.description: Start date of sale price, as GMT.

date_on_sale_to.description: End date of sale price, in the site's timezone.

date_on_sale_to_gmt.description: End date of sale price, in the site's timezone.

download_limit.description: Number of times downloadable files can be downloaded after purchase.

download_expiry.description: Number of days until access to downloadable files expires.

backorders.description: If managing stock, this controls if backorders are allowed.

low_stock_amount.description: Low Stock amount for the variation.

context.description: Scope under which the request is made; determines fields present in response.

per_page.description: Maximum number of items to be returned in result set.

search.description: Search by similar product name, sku, or attribute value.

after.description: Limit response to resources published after a given ISO8601 compliant date.

before.description: Limit response to resources published before a given ISO8601 compliant date.

modified_after.description: Limit response to resources modified after a given ISO8601 compliant date.

modified_before.description: Limit response to resources modified before a given ISO8601 compliant date.

dates_are_gmt.description: Whether to consider GMT post dates when limiting response by published or modified date.

exclude.description: Ensure result set excludes specific IDs.

include.description: Limit result set to specific ids.

offset.description: Offset the result set by a specific number of items.

order.description: Order sort attribute ascending or descending.

parent.description: Limit result set to those of particular parent IDs.

parent_exclude.description: Limit result set to all items except those of a particular parent ID.

slug.description: Limit result set to products with a specific slug.

status.description: Limit result set to products assigned a specific status.

sku.description: Limit result set to products with specific SKU(s). Use commas to separate.

on_sale.description: Limit result set to products on sale.

min_price.description: Limit result set to products based on a minimum price.

max_price.description: Limit result set to products based on a maximum price.

stock_status.description: Limit result set to products with specified stock status.

has_price.description: Limit result set to products with or without price.

attributes.description: Limit result set to products with specified attributes.

virtual.description: Limit result set to virtual product variations.

downloadable.description: Limit result set to downloadable product variations.

include_status.description: Limit result set to product variations with any of the statuses.

exclude_status.description: Exclude product variations with any of the statuses from result set.

pos_products_only.description: Limit result set to variations visible in Point of Sale.

context.description: Scope under which the request is made; determines fields present in response.

per_page.description: Maximum number of items to be returned in result set.

search.description: Limit results to those matching a string.

after.description: Limit response to resources published after a given ISO8601 compliant date.

before.description: Limit response to reviews published before a given ISO8601 compliant date.

exclude.description: Ensure result set excludes specific IDs.

include.description: Limit result set to specific IDs.

offset.description: Offset the result set by a specific number of items.

order.description: Order sort attribute ascending or descending.

reviewer.description: Limit result set to reviews assigned to specific user IDs.

reviewer_exclude.description: Ensure result set excludes reviews assigned to specific user IDs.

reviewer_email.description: Limit result set to that from a specific author email.

product.description: Limit result set to reviews assigned to specific product IDs.

status.description: Limit result set to reviews assigned a specific status.

product_id.description: Unique identifier for the product that the review belongs to.

force.description: Whether to bypass trash and force deletion.

include.description: Limit result set to items that have the specified rate ID(s) assigned.

postcode.description: Postcode/ZIP, it doesn't support multiple values. Deprecated as of WooCommerce 5.3, 'postcodes' should be used instead.

city.description: City name, it doesn't support multiple values. Deprecated as of WooCommerce 5.3, 'cities' should be used instead.

compound.description: Whether or not this is a compound rate.

shipping.description: Whether or not this tax rate also gets applied to shipping.

order.description: Indicates the order that will appear in queries.

postcodes.description: List of postcodes / ZIPs. Introduced in WooCommerce 5.3.

cities.description: List of city names. Introduced in WooCommerce 5.3.
